arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Face Robert Lewandowski and FC Barcelona
arts.sum: Use those and don’t share any illegal streams in the comments. Streaming: Paramount+ (USA), discovery+ (UK)

arts.ttl: Barcelona tell €60m star that he has no future at the club
arts.sum: Vitor Roque will not return to Barcelona after his loan at Real Betis, according to Spanish media. With Barcelona in desperate need to offload players to comply with LaLiga's financial regulations, they agreed to send Roque on loan to Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Report: Barcelona compile shortlists to address problem positions
arts.sum: Barcelona are reported to have compiled a list of three potential targets to address a shortage at right-back this season, as well as monitoring options on the left.

arts.ttl: Tebas gives his verdict on Barca’s hopes of registering Olmo
arts.sum: La Liga president Javier Tebas has been asked about Barcelona’s hopes of re-registering Dani Olmo and is hopeful the Catalans will be able to make their finances work. Tebas has been asked about the situation and thinks it will be done.

arts.ttl: Villarreal star Baena speaks out on future amid Barcelona links
arts.sum: Villarreal star Álex Baena has this week provided an insight into his future with the Yellow Submarine. The name of midfielder/winger Baena has of course long proven a prominent one…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona LIVE: Possible lineups and latest news
arts.sum: Good evening everybody and welcome along to another MARCA in English live blog, this time taking you through the Champions League clash between Borussia Dortmund and Barcelona from Signal Iduna Park in Germany. Meanwhile, Barcelona's European form contrasts with their slightly shaky domestic performances.

arts.ttl: What does Borussia Dortmund’s motto ‘Echte Liebe’ mean?
arts.sum: You could say that ‘ Echte Liebe ’ is a short and concise motto, since its literal translation into English is simply “ true love ”. Having been a regular in the tournament over the past thirty years (today’s game will be the team’s 189th), fans are used to reading or hearing the motto ‘ Echte Liebe ’, which has been used by BVB fans and players since 2009.

arts.ttl: Barcelona have already made a decision on Vitor Roque’s future
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have already come to what is essentially a definitive decision on Vitor Roque’s future with the club. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Barcelona stars reveal favourite music artists with Spotify Wrapped
arts.sum: Barcelona's listening habits have been revealed with Spotify Wrapped.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund take on Barcelona in the Champions League this evening with both teams aiming to edge closer to the knockout rounds. Sixth and seventh in the standings heading into Wednesday night’s fixtures, a victory for either would be a giant step towards securing a place in the top eight.
